response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the entire video for any vocal music. 2. The video consists entirely of instrumental background music used for promotional purposes. 3. Confirmed that no songs with vocals are present. 4. Generated the scene breakdown based on visual slide changes in the promotional content. 5. Set contains_vocal_music to false for all scenes and provided null values for song-related metadata fields.
response.global_summary: A promotional video for the hololive English 4th Concert 'Serendipity', showcasing merchandise, fan messages, fan art, and event information. The video features instrumental background music throughout and does not contain any vocal performances.

scenes.description: Overview of concert merchandise: Light Stick, T-shirt, Acrylic Keychains, and Stickers. Instrumental background music plays.
Overview of Acrylic Stands merchandise. Instrumental background music continues.
Overview of Button Badges and Acrylic Panel merchandise. Instrumental background music continues.
Slideshow of fan messages and fan art submitted for the concert. Instrumental background music continues.
'The concert will be starting soon' screen. Instrumental background music continues.
'Attention for Visitors' safety information screen. Instrumental background music continues.
Recap of merchandise items. Instrumental background music continues until the end of the video.
